data.title: Prepared If Trump Declares A Premature Victory, Says Kamala Harris: 'We Have The Resources And The Expertise'
data.description: Kamala Harris assured that her team is prepared to handle any premature victory claim by Donald Trump in an interview with NBC News on Tuesday Oct. 22, 2024.

data.title: Kamala Harris Face Potential Setback In Nevada's Early Voting: 'Firewall' Collapses In Clark County, Says Veteran Election Watcher
data.description: Early voting results from Nevada show Republicans leading for the first time since 2008, signaling potential challenges for Vice President Kamala Harris and the Democratic Party in the upcoming elections.

data.title: Trump Vs. Harris: Vice President Holds Slim Lead, Losing Momentum In Key Demographics, Favorability After Media Blitz
data.description: Kamala Harris leads Donald Trump by a slim margin in a new 2024 election poll. The vice president is losing ground in key demographics.

data.title: Mattel, Hasbro Ahead Of Earnings, Holiday Season: JPMorgan Says Consumers 'Remain Soft'
data.description: JPMorgan analysts offer a preview of third-quarter earnings for Mattel and Hasbro before the toymakers report later this week. Here's what to know.

data.title: Elon Musk Jet Tracker Suspended On Threads, Instagram: 'This Situation Reflects Poorly On Meta'
data.description: Accounts linked to tracking flights of Elon Musk and other celebrities have been suspended from Instagram and Threads, having the account creator asking questions.
